applicabilityConditions: Azure AI infrastructure requires material sequential investment
Scaled capital investment would increase COGS
FY24 operating-expense growth is expected to remain low
Capacity buildout timing varies by quarter
nonApplicabilityConditions: investment needs spanned infrastructure and multiple operating teams
exceptions: disciplined cost management across every team
external supply supplements owned capacity when lead time requires it

review.rationale: Approved after exact-span review: FY23 and FY24 support scaling AI infrastructure while constraining operating-expense growth; FY22 preserves the broad-demand boundary; external supply remains a lead-time tactic; talent reallocation, margin guarantees, and post-outcome claims are excluded.
